faq.title: Brow Tint Preview FAQ
faq.description: Common questions about AI brow tinting previews, photo tips, and how to get the best brow tint results.

items.question: Are the brow tint previews in this gallery free?
items.answer: Yes. You can browse every brow tint style for free and generate previews on your own photo with a free trial.

items.question: Will the AI brow tint preview match my real results?
items.answer: Brow Tint renders realistic tint shades and coverage that blend with your natural brow hair. Actual results still depend on your brow type and your brow artist — we recommend downloading your preview and sharing it with your professional brow tint specialist.

items.question: How many brow tint styles can I try?
items.answer: There are dozens of curated brow tint styles in the gallery, covering natural tints, bold tints, brow lamination and tint combos, tinted brow gel looks, and lash and brow tint packages. You can also describe custom shades with your own prompt.

items.question: Do I need to install an app to use Brow Tint?
items.answer: No. Brow Tint runs entirely in your browser — on mobile or desktop. No downloads or plugins required.

items.question: What photo works best for a brow tint preview?
items.answer: Use a clear, front-facing photo with even lighting. Avoid sunglasses, hats, or heavy filters. A neutral expression with visible brows gives the AI the most accurate brow tinting result.

items.question: Is my photo kept private?
items.answer: Your uploaded photos are processed securely for brow tint generation only. They are not stored permanently or shared with third parties.

items.question: What is the difference between brow tinting and brow lamination?
items.answer: Brow tinting adds color to your brow hairs for a fuller, more defined look. Brow lamination and tint combines a chemical straightening process with tinting to create brushed-up, feathered brows. You can preview both with Brow Tint.

items.question: Can Brow Tint help me find the right brow code shade?
items.answer: Yes. Brow Tint uses AI to analyze your skin tone, hair color, and features to recommend the best brow tint shade match — similar to a brow code tint formula. Try multiple shades side by side to find your perfect professional brow tint color.
